title: Ireland shuts last coal plant, becomes 15th coal-free country in Europe (2025)
author: robin_reala
aiHeadline: Ireland finally catches up to the rest of Europe by banning coal, proving that even the Emerald Isle can't resist the green wave.

title: US Court of Appeals: TOS may be updated by email, use can imply consent [pdf]
author: dryadin
aiHeadline: US Court rules that ignoring your emails now means you've agreed to the new TOS, because clearly, you read every single one.

title: FontCrafter: Turn your handwriting into a real font
author: rendx
aiHeadline: Now you can turn your terrible handwriting into a professional font, because who doesn't want to flaunt their lack of penmanship?

title: Building a Procedural Hex Map with Wave Function Collapse
author: imadr
aiHeadline: Building a hex map is so easy, even a computer can do it with some advanced algorithms, proving that even maps need a PhD now.

title: How the Sriracha guys screwed over their supplier
author: thunderbong
aiHeadline: When a company decides that their supplier's suffering is just another ingredient in their recipe for success, you know capitalism is at its finest.
